---
title: Usage
format: html
toastui:
  minimal:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-01"
    events:
      - title: "Team Offsite"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-09T10:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-09T16:00:00"

  day-view:
    defaultView: day
    date: "2026-04-15"
    events:
      - title: "Standup"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-15T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-15T09:30:00"
      - title: "Deep Work"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-15T10:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-15T12:00:00"
      - title: "Lunch"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-15T12:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-15T13:00:00"
      - title: "Code Review"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-15T14:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-15T15:30:00"

  week-view:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-09"
    events:
      - title: "Morning Run"
        calendarId: cal1
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-09T06:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-09T07:00:00"
      - title: "Team Standup"
        calendarId: cal2
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-09T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-09T09:30:00"
      - title: "Design Review"
        calendarId: cal2
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-10T14:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-10T15:30:00"
    calendars:
      - id: cal1
        name: Personal
        backgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
      - id: cal2
        name: Work
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"

  allday:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Sprint Planning"
        category: allday
        start: "2026-04-14"
        end: "2026-04-14"
        isAllday: true
      - title: "Conference"
        category: allday
        start: "2026-04-16"
        end: "2026-04-18"
        isAllday: true
        backgroundColor: "#ff6b6b"
      - title: "Workshop"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-15T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-15T12:00:00"

  popup:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    useDetailPopup: true
    calendars:
      - id: cal1
        name: Work
        color: "#ffffff"
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
        borderColor: "#00a9ff"
    events:
      - title: "Design Review"
        calendarId: cal1
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T11:30:00"
        location: "Room A"
        attendees: "Alice"
      - title: "Sprint Retro"
        calendarId: cal1
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-15T14:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-15T15:00:00"
        location: "Main Hall"
        attendees: "Bob"

  tsv-events:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-01"
    height: 620px
    file: data/events.tsv
    file-sep: "\t"

  csv-events:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-17"
    file: data/events.csv
    file-sep: ","

  custom-height:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-09"
    height: 400px
    navigation: false
    week:
      taskView: false
      eventView: ['time']
      hourStart: 6
      hourEnd: 20
    events:
      - title: "Morning Run"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-09T06:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-09T07:00:00"
      - title: "Team Standup"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-09T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-09T09:30:00"

  schedule:
    defaultView: week
    file: "data/schedule.csv"
    file-sep: ","
    date: "2026-11-16"
    useDetailPopup: true
    height: 960px
    timegridHeight: 900px
    week:
      workweek: true
      taskView: false
      eventView: ['time']
      hourStart: 9
      hourEnd: 21
      showNowIndicator: true
    timezone:
      zones:
        - timezoneName: Europe/Stockholm
    calendars:
      - id: "session"
        name: "Session"
        color: inherit
        backgroundColor: "#D6EAF8"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#D6EAF8"
        borderColor: "#85C1E9"
      - id: "free"
        name: "Free"
        color: inherit
        backgroundColor: "#FCF3CF"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#FCF3CF"
        borderColor: "#F7DC6F"
      - id: "extra"
        name: "Extra"
        color: inherit
        backgroundColor: "#E8DAEF"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#E8DAEF"
        borderColor: "#BB8FCE"
---

The examples below are ordered from simplest to most advanced. Each one introduces new features on top of the previous examples.

## 1. Minimal calendar

The simplest possible calendar: a single event in **month** view. Events are defined directly in the YAML front matter under a named key (here `minimal`), and then rendered with the `toastui` shortcode referencing that key.

Every event needs at least three fields: `title`, `start`, and `end`.

```yaml
---
toastui:
  minimal:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-01"
    events:
      - title: "Team Offsite"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-09T10:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-09T16:00:00"
---
```

```markdown
{{{< toastui minimal >}}}
```

{{< toastui minimal >}}

## 2. Day view

Switch to a **day** view to see a detailed hour-by-hour timeline. This is useful when you want to focus on a single day's agenda. Set `defaultView: day` and set `date` to the target day.

```yaml
toastui:
  day-view:
    defaultView: day
    date: "2026-04-15"
    events:
      - title: "Standup"
        category: time
        start: "2026-04-15T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-15T09:30:00"
      - title: "Deep Work"
        ...
```

```markdown
{{{< toastui day-view >}}}
```

{{< toastui day-view >}}

## 3. Week view with calendars

The **week** view spans seven days and is the default view if none is specified. This example also introduces **calendars** — named colour groups that let you visually distinguish event categories. Each event references a calendar via `calendarId`.

```yaml
toastui:
  week-view:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-09"
    events:
      - title: "Morning Run"
        calendarId: cal1
        ...
    calendars:
      - id: cal1
        name: Personal
        backgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
      - id: cal2
        name: Work
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
```

```markdown
{{{< toastui week-view >}}}
```

{{< toastui week-view >}}

## 4. All-day and multi-day events

Events can span entire days or stretch across multiple days. Set `category: allday` and `isAllday: true` for all-day events. They are rendered in a banner at the top of the calendar. Regular timed events appear alongside them in the time grid.

```yaml
events:
  - title: "Sprint Planning"
    category: allday
    start: "2026-04-14"
    end: "2026-04-14"
    isAllday: true
  - title: "Conference"
    category: allday
    start: "2026-04-16"
    end: "2026-04-18"
    isAllday: true
    backgroundColor: "#ff6b6b"
  - title: "Workshop"
    category: time
    start: "2026-04-15T09:00:00"
    end: "2026-04-15T12:00:00"
```

```markdown
{{{< toastui allday >}}}
```

{{< toastui allday >}}

## 5. Detail popup

Enable `useDetailPopup: true` to let users click on an event and see a popup with extra information such as `location`, `attendees`, and `state`. The popup only shows these sections when the event explicitly defines them — if a property is not set, its row is hidden.

```yaml
toastui:
  popup:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    useDetailPopup: true
    events:
      - title: "Design Review"
        start: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T11:30:00"
        location: "Room A"
        attendees: "Alice"
      ...
```

```markdown
{{{< toastui popup >}}}
```

{{< toastui popup >}}

## 6. Events from a TSV file

Instead of listing events in YAML, point `file` to a **tab-separated** file and set `file-sep` to `"\t"`. The file must have a header row with at least the columns `title`, `start`, and `end`. Optional columns like `calendarId`, `category`, `location`, and `backgroundColor` are picked up automatically.

```yaml
toastui:
  tsv-events:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-01"
    height: 620px
    file: data/events.tsv
    file-sep: "\t"
```

```markdown
{{{< toastui tsv-events >}}}
```

{{< toastui tsv-events >}}

## 7. Events from a CSV file

Comma-delimited files work the same way — just change `file-sep` to `","`. This example also uses the **week** view so you can see the timed events on the grid.

```yaml
toastui:
  csv-events:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-17"
    file: data/events.csv
    file-sep: ","
```

```markdown
{{{< toastui csv-events >}}}
```

{{< toastui csv-events >}}

## 8. Fully inline shortcode

You can skip YAML metadata entirely and pass **all** options directly in the shortcode. This style is handy for quick one-off calendars or prototypes. Note that inline arguments cannot express complex nested structures like `calendars` or `week` options.

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/events.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="day" date="2026-04-15" >}}}
```

{{< toastui file="data/events.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="day" date="2026-04-15" >}}

## 9. Inline override of metadata

You can **combine** YAML metadata with inline arguments. The metadata key provides the base configuration, and any inline arguments override individual values. Here the `week-view` config is reused but switched to month view with a different date and height.

```markdown
{{{< toastui week-view defaultView="month" date="2026-04-01" height="500px" >}}}
```

{{< toastui week-view defaultView="month" date="2026-04-01" height="500px" >}}

## 10. Full-featured schedule

This example puts it all together: events loaded from a CSV file, custom calendar colours for different event types, detail popups, timezone configuration, a workweek-only week view with custom hour range, and an enlarged time grid. This pattern is well suited for multi-day workshops and conference programmes. `height` and `timegridHeight` are manually set to remove scroll bar.

```yaml
toastui:
  schedule:
    defaultView: week
    file: "data/schedule.csv"
    file-sep: ","
    date: "2026-11-16"
    useDetailPopup: true
    height: 960px
    timegridHeight: 900px
    week:
      workweek: true
      taskView: false
      eventView: ['time']
      hourStart: 9
      hourEnd: 21
      showNowIndicator: true
    timezone:
      zones:
        - timezoneName: Europe/Stockholm
    calendars:
      - id: "session"
        name: "Session"
        backgroundColor: "#D6EAF8"
        borderColor: "#85C1E9"
      - id: "free"
        name: "Free"
        backgroundColor: "#FCF3CF"
        borderColor: "#F7DC6F"
      - id: "extra"
        name: "Extra"
        backgroundColor: "#E8DAEF"
        borderColor: "#BB8FCE"
```

```markdown
{{{< toastui schedule >}}}
```

{{< toastui schedule >}}
